autoSave.title: Save audio recordings
autoSave.description: Automatically save audio when recording stops

disabledAlert: Audio recording is disabled. Enable “Save audio recordings” to automatically save meeting audio.

notification.title: Recording start notification
notification.description: Show a reminder to let participants know recording has started

devices.title: Audio devices
devices.description: Choose your preferred microphone and system audio device. They will be selected automatically when new recordings start.

deviceSelection.loadError: Failed to load audio devices. Please check your system audio settings.
deviceSelection.noMicToMonitor: No microphone devices found to monitor
deviceSelection.monitoringStartFailed: Failed to start audio level monitoring

hint.micText: records your voice and surrounding sounds
hint.systemText: records audio from your computer (music, calls, etc.)

backend.label: System audio capture
backend.tooltipHint: Try different methods to find the best one for your system.
backend.loadError: Failed to load available capture methods
backend.changeError: Failed to change capture method. Please try again.
backend.noteSystemOnly: The selected method only affects system audio capture
backend.noteMicDefault: The microphone always uses the default method
backend.noteNewSessions: Changes apply to new recording sessions

download.localNote: Models run locally — no internet needed for transcription

summary.autoDescription: Automatically create a summary after recording finishes
